data.body: Classification: llm-behavioral. Root cause: Instruction Locality (#16) — Step 1.5 per-artifact approval loop fires for every Write call, overriding the Batch Group Protocol (max 6 approvals). Secondary gap: no permissions mode instruction early in Phase 0. Fix: rewrite Step 1.5 to defer to Batch Group 3 boundary; add Step 0.1a permissions prompt.
